metadata.title: BPS Tracker - AI-Powered Bull Put Spread Tracking
metadata.description: The Bull Put Spread tracker built for options traders who sell premium systematically. Real-time Greeks, IV Rank, AI risk analysis, and options income tracking — all in one iOS app.

hero.description: Systematic options income tracking for Bull Put Spread traders. Real-time Greeks, IV Rank monitoring, AI risk analysis, and personalized alerts — keep every trade under control.

whyBPS.title: Why BPS Tracker?
whyBPS.subtitle: Built specifically for Bull Put Spread traders who want simplicity and clarity

focused.title: Purpose-Built for BPS
focused.description: Not a generic options tool. Every feature is optimized for Bull Put Spread strategy.

fast.title: 30-Second Setup
fast.description: Streamlined input flow. Add a new position in seconds, not minutes.

clear.title: AI-Powered Insights
clear.description: Get instant portfolio risk analysis powered by Gemini AI. Identify high-risk positions automatically.

privacy.title: Your Data on Device, Quotes from BPS
privacy.description: Position data stays entirely on your device. Real-time quotes and Greeks are powered by the official BPS API — no third-party account required, works out of the box.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your Bull Put Spread positions

ai.title: AI Risk Analysis
ai.description: Gemini-powered portfolio analysis. Identify high-risk positions, track earnings events, get personalized recommendations. Free: 10/month, Pro: 200/month.

greeks.title: Real-Time Greeks + Trend Charts
greeks.description: Full Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega display with opening vs current comparison. Pro unlocks historical trend charts for Delta, IV, and Theta to track position evolution.

risk.title: Visual Risk Bar
risk.description: Intuitive risk visualization showing position safety at a glance. Pro unlocks historical IV data for a more precise Risk Bar.

alerts.title: Custom Alerts
alerts.description: Set personalized thresholds for Delta, DTE, OTM%, and P&L. Get notified when positions need attention. (Pro only)

import.title: Screenshot Import
import.description: Snap a screenshot of your broker and import positions instantly. AI-powered OCR extracts all details. Free: 8/month, Pro: 80/month.

market.title: Market View
market.description: Real-time VIX gauge, Fear & Greed Index, CBOE SKEW, and earnings calendar. See market conditions at a glance to time your entries with confidence.

screenshots.title: App Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See how BPS Tracker helps you manage your positions
screenshots.positions: Portfolio Overview — 19 open positions, real-time P&L and Theta income at a glance
screenshots.detail: Position Details — Full Greeks, OTM%, breakeven, Delta & IV trend charts (Pro)
screenshots.market: Market View — VIX gauge, Fear & Greed Index, CBOE SKEW, earnings calendar
screenshots.import: Screenshot Import — AI-powered OCR extracts position details from broker screenshots
screenshots.history: Trading History — 29 closed trades, win rate and cumulative P&L summary

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to master your Bull Put Spread positions

step1.title: Add Position
step1.description: Enter manually or import via screenshot. Supports CSV import/export with OCC standard format.

step2.title: AI Analyzes Risk
step2.description: Gemini AI evaluates your portfolio, identifies high-risk positions, and provides personalized insights.

step3.title: Track & Manage
step3.description: Monitor Greeks in real-time, receive alerts, and record closing results for performance history.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Free forever, or unlock the full toolkit with Pro

footer.description: AI-powered Bull Put Spread position tracking for serious options traders.
